title: Aspidium fernandense

This family comprises a diverse group of ferns commonly known as the spleenworts. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, providing relief from various health issues such as inflammation, pain, and fever, due to its anti-inflammatory, analgesic, and antipyretic effects.
